merge_behavior: Matching hooks from multiple files all run.
Multiple matching command hooks for the same event are launched concurrently, so one hook cannot prevent another matching hook from starting.

events.name: SessionStart
events.description: Bootstrap session context or run lightweight environment checks before Codex starts working.
events.matcher_guidance: Use a matcher only for `startup` or `resume`. `*` and an empty matcher both mean match all.
events.output_guidance: Plain text stdout is added as extra developer context. JSON can return `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext`.
events.blocking_guidance: There is no dedicated blocking shape for this event. Keep it lightweight and context-oriented.

events.name: PreToolUse
events.description: Gate or deny Bash commands before they run.
events.matcher_guidance: Current Codex runtime only emits `Bash` here. Other matcher regexes parse, but they do not match anything useful today.
events.output_guidance: Plain text stdout is ignored. JSON can deny with `hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision = "deny"` or the legacy `decision: "block"` shape.
events.blocking_guidance: Use `deny_pre_tool_use` or exit code `2` with a reason on stderr to block the Bash command before it runs.

events.name: PostToolUse
events.description: React to Bash command results after the command has already run.
events.matcher_guidance: Current Codex runtime only emits `Bash` here, and not every shell path is intercepted yet.
events.output_guidance: Plain text stdout is ignored. JSON can add context, replace the feedback Codex sees next, or return `continue: false`.
events.blocking_guidance: This event cannot undo command side effects. Treat `decision: "block"` here as feedback control, not as prevention.

events.name: UserPromptSubmit
events.description: Inject context into user prompts or block a prompt before it is sent.
events.matcher_guidance: Current runtime ignores `matcher` for this event.
events.output_guidance: Plain text stdout is added as extra developer context. JSON can add context or block with `decision: "block"`.
events.blocking_guidance: Use `block_with_reason` or exit code `2` with stderr when you need Codex to stop and ask for a clearer prompt.

events.name: Stop
events.description: Run end-of-turn review or request one more Codex pass before the turn fully stops.
events.matcher_guidance: Current runtime ignores `matcher` for this event.
events.output_guidance: When exiting `0`, stdout must be JSON. `decision: "block"` continues Codex with your `reason` as a new continuation prompt.
events.blocking_guidance: Treat `block` on `Stop` as 'continue and do one more pass', not as a normal reject decision.
